message:
data(audit): record config, app, runtime builder audits (all SOUND)

Session total: 80 files, ~180K lines audited. 4 bugs fixed:
- CORS CRLF injection (CRITICAL)
- mpsc lost wakeup (HIGH)
- 8 sequence counter overflows (MEDIUM)
- mysql connection pool leak (MINOR)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
